# FS-UAE test suite for tee 1.15 (OpenBSD)
# Category 1 (CLI tool) -- minimum 8 tests required
# Generated by test-designer agent
#
# NOTE: tee reads from STDIN_FILENO only -- no file input argument.
# All tests that need stdin input use WORK:test-tee-run.rexx, an ARexx
# wrapper that creates an Execute script with < redirection internally.
# This avoids prohibited < and | in CMD lines (ARexx ADDRESS COMMAND
# limitation) while still feeding data to tee.

TEST: basic stdin passthrough to stdout (no output files)
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-tee-input.txt
EXPECT: tee test line one
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: write stdin to a single output file while passing through to stdout
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-tee-input.txt T:tee-single-out.txt
EXPECT: tee test line one
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: append mode (-a) appends to existing file instead of overwriting
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-tee-input.txt -a T:tee-append-out.txt
EXPECT: tee test line one
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: write to multiple output files simultaneously
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-tee-input.txt T:tee-multi1.txt T:tee-multi2.txt
EXPECT: tee test line one
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -i flag (ignore SIGINT) is accepted without error
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-empty.txt -i
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: invalid flag prints usage to stderr and returns RETURN_ERROR
CMD: WORK:tee -z
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: nonexistent output directory causes open failure and returns RETURN_ERROR
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-tee-input.txt WORK:nodir/nosuchfile.txt
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: empty input produces no stdout output and returns RETURN_OK
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-empty.txt
EXPECT:
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: long line (>1024 chars) passes through 64KB buffer without truncation
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-longline.txt
EXPECT_CONTAINS: MARKER
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: Amiga RAM: volume path accepted as output file (Amiga path handling)
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-tee-input.txt RAM:tee-amiga-test.txt
EXPECT: tee test line one
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: Amiga T: volume path accepted as output file (temp volume path handling)
CMD: rx WORK:test-tee-run.rexx WORK:test-oneline.txt T:tee-temp-test.txt
EXPECT: hello world
EXPECT_RC: 0
